home.title: OAuth 2.0 & OIDC Flows, Visualized | oauthflows
home.description: Step-by-step visualizations of OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, PKCE, Device Code, Client Credentials, and ID-JAG flows. Learn auth by watching it happen.

playground.title: OAuth Playground — Live OAuth 2.0 / OIDC Tester
playground.description: Plug in your own OAuth client and watch the flow execute live: real HTTP requests, real redirects, decoded JWTs. Free OAuth 2.0 & OIDC playground.

oauth-consent.title: OIDC Login Flow Explained Visually | oauthflows
oauth-consent.description: See how OpenID Connect authentication works: ID tokens, consent, and SSO walked through step by step with an identity provider.

pkce.title: PKCE Flow Explained | OAuth 2.0 Auth Code + PKCE
pkce.description: Visual walkthrough of OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code with PKCE — see how code_verifier and code_challenge stop code interception attacks.

refresh-token.title: OAuth Refresh Token Flow & Token Rotation Explained
refresh-token.description: How OAuth 2.0 refresh tokens silently renew access tokens, and how rotation detects replay attacks before they cause damage.

client-credentials.title: OAuth Client Credentials (M2M) Flow Explained
client-credentials.description: Step-by-step OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials grant for machine-to-machine auth — for microservices, cron jobs, and CI/CD pipelines.

app-to-app.title: OAuth App-to-App Delegation: Multi-Party Flow
app-to-app.description: How does Calendar talk to Zoom without sharing your password? Walk through multi-party OAuth 2.0 delegation with a visual step-by-step flow.

device-code.title: OAuth Device Code Flow Explained Visually
device-code.description: How smart TVs and CLI tools use the OAuth 2.0 Device Authorization Grant to log in without a keyboard. Step-by-step polling and user-code visualization.

implicit-flow.title: OAuth Implicit Flow (Deprecated) Explained
implicit-flow.description: The legacy OAuth 2.0 Implicit grant dropped tokens into the URL fragment. See exactly why OAuth 2.1 deprecated it and what attacks it enabled.

ropc.title: OAuth Password Grant (ROPC) — Why It’s Deprecated
ropc.description: The Resource Owner Password Credentials grant hands the user’s real password to the app, defeating OAuth’s entire purpose. See why ROPC is deprecated.

delegated-api-key.title: API Key Delegation to AI Agents — The Problem
delegated-api-key.description: What happens when a user hands their API key to an AI agent? Visualize the security holes and why delegated keys aren’t safe in production.

agent-as-oauth-client.title: AI Agent as OAuth Client — Pattern & Tradeoffs
agent-as-oauth-client.description: A smarter alternative to API key sharing: the AI agent registers as its own OAuth 2.0 client. See the upgrade — and the IdP visibility gap that remains.

cross-app-access.title: Cross-App Access (ID-JAG) Flow Explained
cross-app-access.description: Walk through the Identity Assertion Authorization Grant — an emerging OAuth pattern giving IdPs full visibility into AI agent access across SaaS apps.
